summary: 401 error hint now names GODADDY_API_KEY/GODADDY_API_SECRET and notes production/OTE keys are not interchangeable, matching the corrected 403 hint.
reason: Auth-hint sweep (follow-on to the 403 fix): the generic '401: check your API credentials' hint did not tell a user with unset/wrong credentials which env vars to set, contradicting the specificity of the 403 hint.
